title: Oracle Field Service Cloud Training
description:
This Oracle Field Service Cloud training covers concepts from Basic level to advance level.  Whether you are individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this Oracle Field Service Cloud training as per your pace.

A cloud-based field service and customer communications solution developed by Oracle is “Oracle Field Service Cloud”. It can collect data from the field and learns in real-time how to accurately predict future events, reducing organizational costs as well as increasing efficiencies. Oracle Field Service Cloud is built on time-based, self-learning, and predictive technology, allowing you to solve business problems while evolving your field service organization. This cloud based field service not only reduces the effort of managing your field service operations but also dramatically improves your employee productivity, reducing the organizational costs and keeping all the customers happy. This version Oracle Field Service Cloud Core Application combines the features of both “Oracle Field Service Core Manage Cloud Service” and “Oracle Field Service Mobility Cloud Service”. Oracle Field Service Core Manage Cloud Service involves the functionality for dispatchers, managers, and administrators and Oracle Field Service Mobility Cloud Service involves the functionality for field resources and both the applications are accessed using different URLs. In Oracle Field Service Cloud, you can use a single URL to access all the functionalities for all these roles. The services available in Oracle Field Service Cloud Core Application include dispatch console, routing, smart collaboration, smart forecasting, capacity, and configuration.

Complete Customization of Oracle Field Service Cloud training’s course content is possible for Individual student and for Corporate.  Oracle Field Service Cloud online training is available for individual and for corporate we may arrange the classroom as well. For more information on Oracle Field Service Cloud training do connect us.
